chapter_title.en: Chapter 24 – Selling the debt with the debt

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف كالموثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (19/52)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف كالموثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (19/52)
text: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) لَا يُبَاعُ الدَّيْنُ بِالدَّيْنِ .

en.hubeali: Muhamamd Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Ibn Mahboub, from Ibrahim Bin Mihzam, from Talha Bin Yazeed,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup> said: ‘Do not sell the debt by the debt’.
en.sarwar: 1. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from ibn Mahbub from Ibrahim ibn Mihzam from Talhah ibn Yazid who has said the following: “Abu ‘ Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said that the Messenger of Allah has said, ’It is not lawful to buy a debt with debt (on credit).”’
